title: ctenitis angustodissecta
intro: Ctenitis angustodissecta, also known as the narrow dissected ctenitis, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis angustodissecta include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The herbal preparation of Ctenitis angustodissecta typically involves infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
